_**Agent (default)**_

Individual note pages now use the same top navigation as the notes home page.

**Change:** Replaced the inline text links in `layouts/notes/single.html` with the shared `toolbar.html` partial.

Each note page now shows the same button-style nav as `/notes/`:
- **All notes** (outline button)
- **Graph view**, **Issues**, **Flashcards**, **Review** (outline buttons, active page highlighted)
- **Random note** / **2 random notes** / **3 random notes** controls

The old plain text links (`← All notes`, `Graph`, etc.) are gone in favor of the `btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm` style used on the notes index. Hugo build completed successfully.
